title: Claude question panel with overlay and focus trap
purpose: Displays Claude questions in an overlay panel with keyboard navigation, focus trapping, and response handling.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named QuestionPanel that uses a questionStore hook for state management and includes keyboard event handling for Escape key dismissal and Tab focus trapping.

steps.content: Initialize the question store hook to access current question and submission state.
Set up a reference to the panel element and focusable elements array.
Add keyboard event listener for Escape key to dismiss the question and Tab key for focus trapping.
Collect focusable elements within the panel for focus trap functionality.
If no current question exists, render nothing.
Define callback handlers for dismissing the question and submitting responses.
Render the overlay backdrop and question panel with header, content area, and footer.
IF the Escape key is pressed, dismiss the current question.
IF the Tab key is pressed and focusable elements exist, implement focus trapping behavior.
IF Shift + Tab is pressed and the first focusable element is active, move focus to the last element.
IF Tab is pressed and the last focusable element is active, move focus to the first element.
Call the dismissQuestion function from the store to close the panel.
Prepare the response data with question ID, answer, and timestamp.
Submit the response to the store and await completion.
IF submission fails, log the error to the console.
